SW10-T1.title: Nemesis daily flip: reveal-payload data + real wiring [contract-change]
SW10-T1.note: Spec: docs/plans/sw-revamp-wiring-gaps.md §4 SW10-T1 (authoritative — supersedes swipe-ux-plan SW5-T1's pick-time trigger). Fires AT REVEAL like SW9's broken_run; nemesis_flip block .nullish() in a core-first PR; tallies replay the scoreboard, NEVER pairing.score (0 until conclude); narration via existing catalog beats only, all slots pinned in the doc; single mount in RevealSequence.

SW10-T2.title: Wire VerdictCard + rematch-by-swipe into the real rematch flow
SW10-T2.note: Spec: docs/plans/sw-revamp-wiring-gaps.md §4 SW10-T2. Replaces RematchPanel's plain button; dayResults derive from GET /pairings/:id scoreboard (viewer's OWN result per row, all rows incl. bonus); edgeGap retyped to score margin with BOTH verdict copy lines reworded (no edge wording); cancelled weeks get no card; NOT a contract-change.

SW10-T3.title: Duo: sealed partner chip + wire the tandem line [contract-change]
SW10-T3.note: Spec: docs/plans/sw-revamp-wiring-gaps.md §4 SW10-T3. (a) partner chip needs a NEW side-free partner_pick_today field on GET /duo/current (.nullish(), core-first; getTodayDailyQuestion lookup; minute-truncated picked_at); (b) duo_tandem block fires AT REVEAL inside the existing viewer gate, single mount in RevealSequence next to SW10-T1's section.

SW10-T4.title: Wire ReactionStamps into /vs/[pairingId] [contract-change]
SW10-T4.note: Spec: docs/plans/sw-revamp-wiring-gaps.md §4 SW10-T4. Separate PAIRING_REACTION_SET (never extend REACTION_SET — it leaks into QuestionThread); server-side ghost rejection + block-severance must be BUILT (none exists to reuse), on write AND read; read path splits per-player stamps (cacheable) from viewer's selected (client-derived or /nemesis-scoped — never on the ISR page).

SW10-T5.title: Visual regression gate for the /dev/ui gallery
SW10-T5.note: Spec: docs/plans/sw-revamp-wiring-gaps.md §4 SW10-T5 (completes SW8-T2's unmet snapshot AC). toHaveScreenshot over every gallery tile, baselines committed, CI-gating; deliberate-pixel-change demo in the PR; extend the existing playwright-report artifact upload.
